mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_execution_lock (application_id, event_id, locked_by, locked_at, expires_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{eventId}, #{lockedBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{expiresAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM approval_execution_lock WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} AND event_id=#{eventId}
DELETE FROM approval_execution_lock WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} AND expires_at < #{now}
